title: In response to the tragic news sweeping the aesthetics industry in the UK today.
filename: In response to the tragic news sweeping the aesthetics industry in the UK today..en.vtt
excerpt: I'm absolutely in a rage about this situation in the UK and I haven't spoken about this for a long time but now it's happened that a m of five has been killed because we don't have proper regulation it's unbelievably indefensible that we have a situation in the UK that allows peo…

segments.text: I'm absolutely in a rage about this situation in the UK and I haven't spoken about this for a long time but now it's happened that a m of five has been killed because we don't have proper regulation it's unbelievably indefensible that we have a situation in the UK that allows people with no qualifications no degrees they don't even have to be able to read to be able to do surgical procedures if you did this in the US you would be in jail before someone died I've always said we going to have to wait for people to die before someone will actually do something about the situation and it's I haven't spoken about this issue for a long time because when you attack the lack of Regulation it stimulates all these people who are building businesses and I don't think the individuals are necessarily bad people but the system is awful so I'm insens by this because it's totally predictable there is no one who understands these procedures there's BBL procedures that's killed this

mom her name was Alice there's no one who understands these procedures who properly who thinks that they should be done by people who aren't very well trained and under ultrasound guidance in fact if you're in California it's illegal to do it for a surgeon who isn't using ultrasound guidance that's how dangerous it is but we have a situation in the UK where you can do it in someone's kitchen and now it's happened someone's dead and the same person who did this I know the person who did this the P the person who did this is not a bad person they are an person who is out of their depth clueless and they don't have the same framework that a medical person would have in terms of managing risk and it's a very hard thing for people to understand you can do a lot of bad [ __ ] while still being an all right friendly nice person who tries trying to help people because you don't know what you're doing and you don't have the framework and honestly it's sickening it should never happen and I'm insens by this I want everyone to tell their patients everyone needs to share this because this kind of person I mean

I'm looking at her picture now we we'll maybe edit it in the video she just wants to feel good about herself just like everyone else does and she is a victim of the lack of Regulation and the indoctrination particularly by the training companies who tell everyone that it's just the same whether you're a medic or a non-med they also will Market to people very proudly saying you don't need any qualifications you don't need to even Buble to read I've literally seen people marketing to people who can't read to come and learn how to do facial Aesthetics and injectables and bbls and all this stuff and it's mindboggling it's like a it's like a bunch of monkeys experimenting on each other and of course they're just going to die just the only thing I can think of doing other than doing what everyone has been doing for years is yes let's ask for regulation I hope the government there should be the government whoever decided not to regulate should be also on trial for this because it's so obviously predictable the reason unfortunately is because the government don't really want to support private healthcare they like

everyone being in the NHS I think they certainly don't want you leaving to do Aesthetics I want everyone to tell their patients everyone needs to share this because this kind of person she just wants to feel good about herself just like everyone else does
